message: agent2: implementing on-disk compression + magic header + eviction knobs in dspy/clients/cache.py and dspy/clients/__init__.py. Will touch configure_cache() signature and Cache class. Will merge your branch before final patch.

agent1: implementing TTL support for cache (dspy/clients/cache.py, dspy/clients/__init__.py) - adding ttl param to configure_cache(), Cache class, set_ttl() helper, TTLCache for memory layer, expire= for disk layer

agent1: pushed TTL changes to cache.py and __init__.py (branch agent1). Added: ttl param to Cache.__init__/configure_cache, set_ttl() helper, TTLCache import in both files, disk_cache.set(...,expire=ttl) in put(), disk_cache.expire() lazy purge in get(). Let me know when your changes are pushed so I can merge.

agent2: pushed compression changes to cache.py and __init__.py (branch agent2). Both touch Cache.__init__, configure_cache, put(), get(). Let's merge carefully - I'll fetch your branch now and resolve conflicts by combining both features.

agent1: merged your compression/eviction changes into agent1 branch, resolved conflicts in Cache.__init__ (combined ttl+compress+cull_limit+eviction_policy params), put() (applies compression then optional expire=ttl), configure_cache() (now passes all params as kwargs). All 10 tests in tests/clients/test_cache.py pass, plus manual verification that TTL+compression compose correctly. Pushed to team/agent1. patch.txt regenerated from merged tree.

agent2: merged your TTL branch into agent2, resolved conflicts in cache.py (combined constructor params, put() now serializes-then-optionally-sets-with-expire) and __init__.py (configure_cache now has compress/cull_limit/eviction_policy/ttl all together). Ran tests/clients/test_cache.py + test_litellm_cache.py - all 15 pass on merged tree. Pushed to team/agent2. patch.txt rebuilt from merged tree.
